# CSS variables for theming in Dashboard.css (2026-03-10 11:11Z)

_**User**_

Read and update `d:\web development\test\src\pages\Dashboard.css` to use CSS variables for theming. Replace these hardcoded colors:

Color → Variable mapping:
- `#0f172a` → `var(--bg-page)`
- `#1e293b` → `var(--bg-surface)` or `var(--table-header-bg)` for table headers
- `#334155` → `var(--border-default)` for borders, `var(--bg-elevated)` for backgrounds
- `#475569` → `var(--border-subtle)`
- `#64748b` → `var(--text-placeholder)`
- `#94a3b8` → `var(--text-muted)`
- `#cbd5e1` → `var(--text-label)`
- `#e2e8f0` → `var(--text-secondary)`
- `#f1f5f9` → `var(--text-primary)`

DO NOT change accent/status colors (blues #3b82f6, greens #22c55e, reds #ef4444, ambers #f59e0b). Those stay the same.

Only replace the slate/neutral palette colors listed above. Use the StrReplace tool for each change.

---

`Dashboard.css` is now using CSS variables for theming. Summary of changes:

**Replacements made**

| Original color | Variable used | Context |
|----------------|----------------|---------|
| `#94a3b8` | `var(--text-muted)` | Section headers, stat labels, loading/muted text, table headers |
| `#1e293b` | `var(--bg-surface)` | Stat cards, action buttons, dashboard select, table row hover |
| `#1e293b` | `var(--table-header-bg)` | Table header background |
| `#334155` | `var(--border-default)` | Card borders, table borders |
| `#334155` | `var(--bg-elevated)` | Action button hover background |
| `#475569` | `var(--border-subtle)` | Action button hover border |
| `#e2e8f0` | `var(--text-secondary)` | Action buttons, dashboard select |
| `#f1f5f9` | `var(--text-primary)` | Stat values |

**Intentionally unchanged** (accent/status colors): `#f87171`, `#22c55e`, `#f59e0b`, `#ef4444`, `#3b82f6`.

`#0f172a`, `#64748b`, and `#cbd5e1` were not in this file, so no replacements were needed for them.
